title: iMac Update Expected This Year, Model With OLED Display Also in Works
excerpt: Apple has finished development of a new iMac that it plans to release later this year, according to a report today from Bloomberg's Mark Gurman....
content_html:
Apple has finished development of a new iMac that it plans to release later this year, according to a report today from Bloomberg's Mark Gurman. The updated iMac is one of 11 new Mac models that Apple plans to release over the next two years or so.


The next iMac will unsurprisingly have a newer chip, but the report did not indicate if Apple plans to use the existing M5 chip or the upcoming M6 chip. Apple has never released an iMac with its higher-end "Pro" or "Max" chips.

No major design changes have been rumored for the next iMac, so it will likely continue to have a 24-inch LCD screen. However, the report said Apple is planning a subsequent iMac with an OLED display for release "further in the future."

The current iMac with the M4 chip was announced in October 2024. The desktop computer did not receive an M5 chip upgrade last year, so the model coming this year would represent the first refresh in two years. The report said the iMac will continue to come in two configurations, with varying CPU/GPU core counts and ports.

Apple discontinued the Intel-based iMac Pro and 27-inch iMac models in 2021 and 2022, respectively, and the computer has only come in a 24-inch size since then. Over the years, there have been rumors that an iMac Pro with at least a 30-inch display and Apple silicon might be released one day, but nothing of that sort has materialized.

Apple raised prices on all Macs last month amid rising memory chip costs. In the U.S., the iMac now starts at $1,499, up from $1,299.

Apple today dramatically increased device prices across multiple product lines. Subscribe to the MacRumors YouTube channel for more videos. After temporarily taking it down earlier today, Apple's online store is back up with a series of product price increases. The changes are as follows: HomePod mini: $129, up from $99 (+$30) HomePod: $349, up from $299 (+$50) Apple TV: $199, up from...

Apple Plans Wider Color Gamut for Future MacBook Pro, iMac, and iPad Pro

Apple plans to adopt OLED panels capable of displaying a much wider range of colors, according to a new report from research firm TrendForce. The new panels would cover 95% of the BT.2020 color standard, which describes a far broader spectrum of colors than the DCI-P3 standard Apple's screens currently target. In practice, that means deeper, more accurate reds, greens, and blues. Reaching...

LEGO Considering Bondi Blue iMac G3 Set

Tuesday July 14, 2026 5:12 pm PDT by Juli Clover

LEGO today said the iMac G3 project submitted for consideration on its "Ideas" site has been moved to Parking Lot status, which means it hasn't been ruled out and could still possibly be turned into an official LEGO set. On its "Ideas" website, LEGO lets fans submit mockups and suggestions for future LEGO sets. Any project that gets at least 10,000 votes goes to the LEGO Review Board and has ...

content_html_zh:
据彭博社 Mark Gurman 今天报道，苹果公司已经完成了新款 iMac 的开发，计划于今年晚些时候发布。 更新后的 iMac 是 Apple 计划在未来两年左右发布的 11 款新 Mac 机型之一。

不出所料，下一代 iMac 将配备更新的芯片，但该报告并未表明苹果是否计划使用现有的 M5 芯片或即将推出的 M6 芯片。 苹果从未发布过配备更高端“Pro”或“Max”芯片的 iMac。

没有传言下一代 iMac 会有重大设计变化，因此它可能会继续配备 24 英寸 LCD 屏幕。 不过，该报道称，苹果计划“在未来”发布一款配备 OLED 显示屏的后续 iMac。

当前配备 M4 芯片的 iMac 于 2024 年 10 月发布。 这款台式电脑去年没有升级 M5 芯片，因此今年推出的型号将是两年来的首次更新。 该报告称，iMac 将继续提供两种配置，具有不同的 CPU/GPU 核心数量和端口。

苹果分别于 2021 年和 2022 年停产了基于英特尔的 iMac Pro 和 27 英寸 iMac 型号，此后该电脑只有 24 英寸尺寸。 多年来，一直有传言称有一天可能会发布一款至少配备 30 英寸显示屏和 Apple 芯片的 iMac Pro，但这一消息并未成为现实。

由于内存芯片成本上涨，苹果上个月提高了所有 Mac 的价格。 在美国，iMac 的起价从 1,299 美元上涨至 1,499 美元。

相关综述：iMac

相关论坛：iMac

Apple 计划为未来的 MacBook Pro、iMac 和 iPad Pro 提供更宽的色域

根据研究公司 TrendForce 的一份新报告，苹果计划采用能够显示更广泛颜色的 OLED 面板。 新面板将覆盖 BT.2020 颜色标准的 95%，该标准描述的颜色范围比苹果屏幕当前目标的 DCI-P3 标准要广泛得多。 实际上，这意味着更深、更准确的红色、绿色和蓝色。 达到...
